mustPass: home route and contact route are included
all default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries
route ids and section ids use kebab-case slugs where applicable
route paths are Swedish, lowercase, start with '/' and have no trailing slash
page set is tailored to metallmalmsutvinning with verksamhet, säkerhet/miljö and anläggningar/projekt as core routes
recommended dossiers only use allowed dossier ids
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without mining-specific pages
invented safety certifications, permit claims or production figures
testimonial-heavy layouts that imply retail purchasing behaviour
vague sustainability language without concrete context
